title: Online Doctor 在线医疗咨询
scene: 患者通过在线平台咨询医生

lines.speaker: Patient
lines.line: Hello, Doctor. I have had a headache and a slight fever for two days. Should I be worried?
lines.trans: 您好，医生。我头疼和轻微发烧已经两天了。我应该担心吗？

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.line: Hello. What is your temperature? And do you have any other symptoms like cough or sore throat?
lines.trans: 您好。您的体温是多少？还有其他症状吗，比如咳嗽或喉咙痛？

lines.speaker: Patient
lines.line: It is about thirty-eight degrees. I have a runny nose, but no cough.
lines.trans: 大约38度。我有点流鼻涕，但没有咳嗽。

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.line: It sounds like a common cold or mild flu. Rest and drink plenty of water. Are you allergic to any medicine?
lines.trans: 听起来像是普通感冒或轻度流感。多休息，多喝水。您对什么药物过敏吗？

lines.speaker: Patient
lines.line: No, I am not allergic to anything. Can I take something for the fever?
lines.trans: 不，我什么都不过敏。我能吃点退烧药吗？

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.line: You can take acetaminophen every six hours if needed. Do not exceed the recommended dose.
lines.trans: 如果需要，您可以每六小时服用一次对乙酰氨基酚。不要超过推荐剂量。

lines.speaker: Patient
lines.line: Should I come to the hospital if the fever does not go down?
lines.trans: 如果烧不退，我应该来医院吗？

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.line: If the fever lasts more than three days or goes above thirty-nine degrees, please visit a clinic for a check-up.
lines.trans: 如果发烧持续超过三天或超过39度，请来诊所检查。

lines.speaker: Patient
lines.line: Understood. I will rest and monitor my temperature. Thank you, Doctor.
lines.trans: 明白了。我会休息并监测体温。谢谢您，医生。

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.line: You are welcome. Take care, and feel free to contact us again if you need more help.
lines.trans: 不客气。保重，如果需要更多帮助，请随时联系我们。
